title: Core RP Duties on a WDA
alt: Checklist of six core Responsible Person duties on a WDA

items.label: Maintain the QMS
items.desc: Implement and improve the quality system, per ICH Q10.

items.label: Verify supply chain
items.desc: Bona fide checks: source from and supply only authorised parties.

items.label: Protect storage & transport
items.desc: Cold chain mapping and continuous monitoring evidence retained.

items.label: Run self-inspections
items.desc: Plan, perform and close CAPAs effectively.

items.label: Handle returns & recalls
items.desc: Manage complaints, falsified medicines; notify MHRA.
